description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 11. Better current-task / suggested-response lifecycle management**.

Goal: add lifecycle regressions for supersession, waiting-for-user transitions, and completed secondary tasks so the refined semantics stay stable over time.

Relevant test surfaces:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration/observation-cycle-*.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/engine-build-context.test.ts`
- extension lifecycle tests under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/extension`

Worker notes:
- test state transitions across multiple turns, not single snapshots only
- include interactions with completion markers and temporal anchors from Tier 1
- assertions should cover both stored state and rendered injected context
title: Add lifecycle tests for supersession, waiting-for-user transitions, and completed secondary tasks
